basic_details.job_title: IIM Ahmedabad Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad (IIM Ahmedabad) Assistant Manager Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIM Ahmedabad. Has been announced through the IIM Ahmedabad Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules. An additional 5 years of age relaxation is provided to women candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate (full time) from any recognized university, Post graduate management degree preferred
qualification.details: Graduate (full time) from any recognized university with minimum 8 years of relevant experience in preparation of tender (contracts for services and works). Post graduate management degree preferred. Acquainted with E-tendering on GeM/CPPP, GFR 2017, contractual clauses, SAP (MM module), MS-Office.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 16-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Ahmedabad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
